'''Millennium Entertainments''' was a huge entertainment and information combine, one of the largest in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Millennium was the largest majority shareholder in [[Galaxy News Service]], and also had interests in other, smaller new companies such as [[TriNebulon News/Legends|TriNebulon News]] and [[CoreDataFiles]]. They were also [[Signatory Sponsors]] of the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] and had a division specifically for the production of [[Hologram/Legends|holos]], [[Millennium Holos]], which produced the popular [[holo-series]] "[[Who Are You To Accuse Me?]]" Millennium also owned several [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racing]] leagues and sports teams.<ref name="HSCS" />
